category_sources: source_facts.description says faac is an ISO AAC audio encoder.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official FAAC SourceForge project page.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official SourceForge project page and best official documentation surface supplied for FAAC.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/knik0/faac, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies ISO AAC audio encoding.
source_facts.executables lists faac as the command-line executable.
